basic_info.name: MIPIM Asia Summit: the property leaders summit in Asia pacific
basic_info.description: MIPIM Asia Summit gathers the Asian real estate industry's leading players for premium property conferences and networking events, in Hong Kong.

The programme Sessions Speakers Awards Networking Practical Information Press Our commitments MIPIM ASIA MIPIM ASIA The property leaders' summit in Asia Pacific 2-3 December 2026 Rosewood, Hong Kong Next MIPIM events: Cannes in March & Riyadh in October Next MIPIM events: Cannes in March & Riyadh in October Stay Informed A Legacy, reinvented A legacy, reinvented For nearly two decades, MIPIM Asia Summit serves as a premier platform that connects global decision-makers with dynamic real estate professionals and investors from Asia’s rapidly evolving markets. In 2025, MIPIM Asia Summit returns to the vibrant city of Hong Kong with a reinvented combination of bold urban showcases , high-energy networking , expert insights , and immersive experiences — now set in the prestigious Rosewood Hotel . It’s the perfect place for leaders to explore Asia’s real estate transformation, seize investment opportunities, and turn ideas into action. Receive Information MIPIM Asia empowers change in real estate MIPIM Asia empowers change in real estate A 360° vision on the industry A 360° vision on the industry A 360° vision of transformation levers of a fast-changing industry, in a fast-growing region. Let’s find concrete solutions to move forward and construct a better built world. The ultimate meeting point The ultimate meeting point For Asian and international decision-makers. Where movers and shakers from every corner of the world, from every sector of real estate, meet to make their future a reality today. An immersive journey An immersive journey Right where real estate is ahead. 2 in-depth days here in Hong-Kong to open minds and grasp the crucial issues that will shape the future of business. A new tailored format designed for leaders A new tailored format designed for leaders AN IMMERSIVE EXPERIENCE IN HONG-KONG AN IMMERSIVE EXPERIENCE IN HONG-KONG A brand-new venue, along with visits to exciting projects and social events held in some of the city's most vibrant locations, promises an unparalleled experience in one of the world’s most dynamic cities: Hong Kong. Fill in the form to receive information about MIPIM Asia Summit. Receive Information The RX Journey to Net Zero At RX, we are serious about sustainability. We are founding members of the Net Zero Carbon Events Pledge to make our company, our shows and the wider events industry net zero. We commit to being Net Zero by 2040 and to make a 50% reduction in greenhouse gas emissions by 2030. In 2023 we published our pathway to net zero, setting out our reduction strategy with key milestones for all our shows. Given the complex nature of our supply chain and the emissions associated with a show, it is only by working together as an industry that we will be able to reduce our impact. We are building a company of net zero heroes to take action and ensure a sustainable future. Download RX Roadmap to Net Zero Welcome to MIPIM Asia Summit. Now, be YOU. At RX’s MIPIM Asia Summit, everyone belongs. We cultivate a culture of inclusion at all our events, where the very things that make each of us unique are celebrated. Our exhibitors, attendees, partners and event colleagues are people from a wide variety of backgrounds, who make our shows stronger and our collective experience richer. Now, be YOU.
